name: Beasts Bane
short_description: In the shadowed depths of the cursed forest, a brave warrior bound to face the lurking monsters takes your place. Will you break the curse and restore peace, or succumb to the darkness? The fate of the realm lies in your hands!
detailed_description:
In the shadowed depths of the cursed forest, a brave warrior bound to face the lurking monsters takes your place. Will you break the curse and restore peace, or succumb to the darkness? The fate of the realm lies in your hands!

Features:

  • Auto-targeting and firing weapons

  • Card selections to customize the character at each level

  • Dozens of weapon options (Bows, Pistols, Light Machine Guns, Rifles, Sniper Rifles, Heavy Machine Guns, Rocket Launchers)

  • Collect gold to select the best cards and strengthen your strategy

  • Fight against challenging and powerful monsters with different strengths and abilities

  • Survival adventure on your own

  • Auto-save system at levels 5, 10, and 15 (no additional saving allowed!)

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Turkish
